selections.name: Elizahro
selections.reason: Promising debut when 4th at Ipswich, followed by a solid 3rd at Toowoomba. Fitter now and looks the clear top pick in this field.

selections.name: Scion
selections.reason: Has had plenty of chances but brings some experience. Can feature in the placings if he runs up to his best.

selections.name: Rouge Angel
selections.reason: First starter who showed some ability with a 3rd in a recent trial. Respecting the stable and market watch advised.

selections.name: Loquito
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and can improve on her 8th at Warwick last start.

danger_horse.name: Excess Capital
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well in barrier 1 and was a solid 2nd here two starts back. Capable of surprising.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #7, Exacta Box 1-7, Trifecta 7 / 1,4,10 / ALL

selections.name: Diamantina Rose
selections.reason: Excellent record over this short course and comes off a narrow 2nd at Warwick. The one to beat.

selections.name: Jacka Stands Alone
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has won first-up previously. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Mister Tudor
selections.reason: Racing consistently with a 4th at Warwick last time out. Deserves another chance in this grade.

selections.name: Dont Call Me Honey
selections.reason: Goes very well fresh and returns in a winnable race. Drawn well to feature.

danger_horse.name: Enuff Pills
danger_horse.reason: Placed in both attempts here and has trialed well leading into this.

selections.name: Enchaanted
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Kilcoy last start when returning from a break. Weighted to take catching here.

selections.name: Lulu A Natural
selections.reason: Not far away in recent starts and gets a favorable draw. Can improve into the placings.

selections.name: Yoweri
selections.reason: Blinkers go on today which could spark improvement. Shows promise and can bounce back.

selections.name: Almond Gold
selections.reason: Senior rider takes over and blinkers go on. Worth another chance on best form.

danger_horse.name: Brass Band
danger_horse.reason: Boxed on steadily for 5th at Grafton in the wet. Close to a win when fresh.

selections.name: Trofeo
selections.reason: Has upside after a 6th at Toowoomba. Trial win suggests he can measure up against this company.

selections.name: Slayrider
selections.reason: Freshened up after a run at Warialda. Capable of better and can feature if he finds his best.

selections.name: The Hindustan (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 3rd at Kilcoy last start. Top-three contender on form.

selections.name: Youmeanddupre
selections.reason: Much easier assignment here after struggling at Gold Coast. Can find winning form.

danger_horse.name: Miss Firestar
danger_horse.reason: First run for a new yard and rates well on her best form.

selections.name: O'caldino
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a solid 3rd at Toowoomba. Quick back-up suits and should prove hard to beat.

selections.name: Whatjeudoin'
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back from a let-up. Gets to the right race to show improvement.

selections.name: Send The Money
selections.reason: Broke through for a win at Kilcoy last start. Weighted to run well again.

selections.name: Waverley
selections.reason: Will find this easier than recent assignments. Expected to go well from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Born To Be Alive
danger_horse.reason: Placed at Coffs Harbour recently. Ready to win and is a major player.

selections.name: Thunder Award
selections.reason: Former Victorian who looks well placed here fresh. Has won previously first-up.

selections.name: Chantilly
selections.reason: Inside draw will assist her chances. Boxed on steadily at Eagle Farm last start.

selections.name: Lukey Blue
selections.reason: Recent form is sound. Speedy type who will give a sight from a good draw.

selections.name: Rowdash
selections.reason: Needs to improve on recent efforts but capable of better on her day.

danger_horse.name: Xerri
danger_horse.reason: Needs to improve sharply but has the class to feature if right.

selections.name: Zousain Girl
selections.reason: Won well at Chinchilla last start. Huge weight drop here and worth following up.

selections.name: Hard As Brok
selections.reason: Nicely placed here after a 4th at Ipswich. Expected to go close.

selections.name: Sheza's Destiny
selections.reason: Won nicely at Ipswich last start. Racing well and expected to measure up again.

selections.name: Elusive Domina
selections.reason: Drawn to take beating after a solid 4th at Sunshine Coast.

danger_horse.name: Britannia Rose
danger_horse.reason: This is easier than her last start at Gold Coast. Worth another chance.

selections.name: Vacillation
selections.reason: Course and distance placed. Solid 2nd at Beaudesert last start and worth keeping safe.

selections.name: Privalova
selections.reason: Rates highly on best form and expected to finish much closer today.

selections.name: Jacks And Soda
selections.reason: Prefer to see how he returns but has ability on his day.

selections.name: Zeamaize
selections.reason: Looks tested on recent form but can improve.

danger_horse.name: Nails And Pride
danger_horse.reason: Likely improver who is definitely worth including in exotics.
